meta.style: corpus-confirmed: Contra-lineage (arcade-1987 feel anchor + competitor visual-bar fidelity)
meta.styleGrounding: corpus (arcade-1987 stage1 frames + competitor stills), verified by looking
knownIssues: boss_enraged: real phase-2 enraged Sentinel sprite produced + synced + loads, but drawBoss doesn't swap to it yet -- wire it to blit assets.get('boss_enraged') during the enrage/phase-2 state (same 46x52 hitbox, faces left) so the escalation is a visible form change, not only a red tint (see QA-NOTES.md #11).

LOW/stretch (not blocking): weapon HUD icon (HUD-1, deferred pending a real icon slot -- current HUD is 8px text) and the arcade tucked-somersault jump (LEAP-1, stylistic). All other produced sprites are WIRED + LIVE.

player.note: WEAPONLESS hero body across ALL poses (idle/run/prone/jump) — no baked rifle. The engine's procedural drawGun (render.js) is the sole aiming weapon, mounted at the hands (gx=x+w/2, gy=y+h*0.28). Fixes the CREATOR_FEEDBACK round-2 two-gun defect; same sprite keys, so no engine wiring change — dropping these in removes the second gun.

turret.note: WEAPONLESS purple dome (no baked barrel) — the engine's rotating drawTurretBarrel is the sole cannon. Fixes the CREATOR_FEEDBACK round-2 phantom-turret (two-gun) defect. Barrel pivot is engine data (config barrelPivotFromBottom/barrelLen), not baked in art.

boss_enraged.note: swap in during the boss enrage/phase-2 state (same hitbox as boss)

pickup.note: engine overlays the per-weapon letter (S/M/L/R/F) on the dark center

theme_bridge.note: creator #1 bridge-over-water theme tile (theme_bridge); wired via render.js drawBridge/drawWater assets.get('theme_bridge').

theme_water.note: creator #1 bridge-over-water theme tile (theme_water); wired via render.js drawBridge/drawWater assets.get('theme_water').

theme_water_top.note: creator #1 bridge-over-water theme tile (theme_water_top); wired via render.js drawBridge/drawWater assets.get('theme_water_top').

theme_cascade.note: biome tileset for the 'cascade' stage (config THEMES.cascade.tileset). Drop-in same format as `tiles`; engine swaps assets.get('tiles') -> assets.get(world.theme.tileset).

theme_snow.note: biome tileset for the 'snow' stage (config THEMES.snow.tileset). Drop-in same format as `tiles`; engine swaps assets.get('tiles') -> assets.get(world.theme.tileset).

theme_desert.note: biome tileset for the 'desert' stage (config THEMES.desert.tileset). Drop-in same format as `tiles`; engine swaps assets.get('tiles') -> assets.get(world.theme.tileset).

theme_foundry.note: biome tileset for the 'foundry' stage (config THEMES.foundry.tileset). Drop-in same format as `tiles`; engine swaps assets.get('tiles') -> assets.get(world.theme.tileset).

theme_caverns.note: biome tileset for the 'caverns' stage (config THEMES.caverns.tileset). Drop-in same format as `tiles`; engine swaps assets.get('tiles') -> assets.get(world.theme.tileset).

theme_fortress.note: biome tileset for the 'fortress' stage (config THEMES.fortress.tileset). Drop-in same format as `tiles`; engine swaps assets.get('tiles') -> assets.get(world.theme.tileset).

bg_cascade.note: biome far-parallax scenery for 'cascade'. render.js drawParallax blits assets.get('bg_cascade') tiled at camx*0.15, ridge base y=158, over the sky gradient; transparent above the silhouette; procedural fallback.

bg_snow.note: biome far-parallax scenery for 'snow'. render.js drawParallax blits assets.get('bg_snow') tiled at camx*0.15, ridge base y=158, over the sky gradient; transparent above the silhouette; procedural fallback.

bg_desert.note: biome far-parallax scenery for 'desert'. render.js drawParallax blits assets.get('bg_desert') tiled at camx*0.15, ridge base y=158, over the sky gradient; transparent above the silhouette; procedural fallback.

bg_foundry.note: biome far-parallax scenery for 'foundry'. render.js drawParallax blits assets.get('bg_foundry') tiled at camx*0.15, ridge base y=158, over the sky gradient; transparent above the silhouette; procedural fallback.

bg_caverns.note: biome far-parallax scenery for 'caverns'. render.js drawParallax blits assets.get('bg_caverns') tiled at camx*0.15, ridge base y=158, over the sky gradient; transparent above the silhouette; procedural fallback.

bg_fortress.note: biome far-parallax scenery for 'fortress'. render.js drawParallax blits assets.get('bg_fortress') tiled at camx*0.15, ridge base y=158, over the sky gradient; transparent above the silhouette; procedural fallback.

boss_snow.note: per-stage boss 'Ice Sentinel' (snow). Same sentinel silhouette/hitbox as the base; engine swaps via assets.get('boss_snow') || assets.get('boss').

boss_foundry.note: per-stage boss 'Foundry Core' (foundry). Same sentinel silhouette/hitbox as the base; engine swaps via assets.get('boss_foundry') || assets.get('boss').

boss_fortress.note: per-stage boss 'Red Falcon' (fortress). Same sentinel silhouette/hitbox as the base; engine swaps via assets.get('boss_fortress') || assets.get('boss').

boss_desert.note: per-stage boss 'Sand Gunship' (desert). Same chopper silhouette/hitbox as the base; engine swaps via assets.get('boss_desert') || assets.get('chopper').

boss_caverns.note: per-stage boss 'Crystal Wing' (caverns). Same chopper silhouette/hitbox as the base; engine swaps via assets.get('boss_caverns') || assets.get('chopper').

decor_cascade_valve.note: biome set-dressing prop for 'cascade'. Base-anchored: engine sits the prop BOTTOM on the ground y at d.x. ENGINE WIRE (2 lines): key 'decor_cascade_valve': 'assets/decor_cascade_valve.png' in assets.js + iterate world.decor in render.js (blit assets.get(d.key) feet-anchored). Placed in config.js CAMPAIGN[].decor; not yet loaded/blitted (Decor-reachability WONT-RENDER).
